title: YIMIKI Foam Seal Tape 2 Rolls 10mm (W) X 6mm(T) High Density Adhesive Foam Weather Strip Seal for Window and Door, 10m Length (2 X 5m Each)
features: 🟠2 ROLLS VALUE PACK-This package includes 2 rolls of 10mm (W) x 6mm (T) x 5M(L)adhesive foam protection tape, total 10M long

🟠STRONG GRID ADHESIVE-We use only premium adhesives on every YIMIKI's closed cell draft excluder weather stripping, which guarantees everything stick firmly. In addition, no more worries of degumming or glue residue due to the unique grid adhesive backing design.

🟠EXCELLENT RESISTANCE TO DEFORMATION FEATURE-This high density foam insulation Tape is made from high density CR foam, Neoprene, which has great sealing and resistance to deformation feature. In addition, the material is environmental friendly, toxic free. The can be used from -50℃ to 150℃

🟠WIDE APPLICATION-YIMIKI's foam seal strips tape is a tough, durable self-stick tape with minimal compression and can help prevent rattles, vibrations and squeaks. It's widely used as a weatherstrip, or as a gasket or to cushion and stabilize major appliances, such as doors, windows, furniture, electrical cabinets, speakers, toys, handicrafts, sports equipment, vents, air conditioners, plumbing, hvac. Plus, on cars, trucks and boats

🟠100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE-We’re dedicated to offering great products with premium quality under strict and highest standards. Contact us if any problem, we provide timely response and perfect solution

product_details_tab_data.title: Pressure Relief Valve for Triton 6Pcs, Mellbree PRD Disc Seals Cover Valve Shower Spares Parts Compatible with Triton Electric Showers
features: BROAD COMPATIBILITY: Our pressure relief device is designed to be compatible with Triton electric showers, including models such as Triton Agio, Triton Alicante, Triton Amber, Triton Aquablast, Triton Aquastorm, Triton Aquasurge, Triton Aquatronic 1 Plus, Triton Aspirante, Triton Aspirante Electric, Triton Aspirante Millenium, Triton Aspirante Topaz, Triton Aspirante Xr, Triton Belize, Triton Bezique 2, Triton Biarritz 2, Triton Biscay 2, and more.
NOTE: The PRD disc can often fail due to scale in hard water areas, Please replace it regularly.

UPGRADE SAFETY: Experience the latest upgrade with our Pressure Relief Device featuring a seal cover design. This innovative feature not only prevents leaks but also offers burst protection in case of excessively high shower pressure, ensuring a safer shower experience for you.

EFFORTLESS INSTALLATION: Mellbree shower pressure relief valve is specifically designed for Triton electric showers as a replacement for the 82800450 model. Simply remove your old pressure relief device and effortlessly install the new PRD replacement. With a leak-proof design, it ensures a secure fit to safeguard and maintain the functionality of your shower.

COMPLETE PACKAGE: We have observed that often it is the seal cover that breaks, so you don't need to spend money replacing the entire PRD, just the cover. You will get 6 seal cover that will give you peace of mind for almost a full year.
